description_long: This is a rectangular chessboard with a polished marble appearance, featuring a classic 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares. The playing surface is smooth and glossy, with the black squares displaying subtle white veining typical of natural stone, while the white squares are clean and bright. The border surrounding the grid is a thick band of white marble, slightly raised and wider than the grid itself, giving the board a solid and luxurious look. The edges of the board are sharply defined, and the entire object appears to be a single solid slab, likely quite heavy. There are no visible inscriptions, markings, or decorative elements on the border, maintaining a minimalist and elegant aesthetic. The board is empty, with no chess pieces present on its surface.
description: A polished marble chessboard with an 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, surrounded by a thick white marble border. The surface is glossy and smooth, with a luxurious and minimalist design.
description_view_0: The chessboard is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the full 8x8 grid and the thick white marble border most prominently at the front.
description_view_1: This view presents the board from a rotated angle, highlighting the right side of the border and the alternating pattern of the squares.
description_view_2: The board is viewed from the opposite side, with the left edge of the border more visible and the marble veining in the black squares standing out.
description_view_3: The chessboard is shown from the back, with the rear edge of the border in focus and the grid pattern still clearly visible.
attribute_board_pattern: The board features a regular 8x8 grid of perfectly square tiles, alternating between black and white. The black squares have natural marble veining, while the white squares are clean and uniform. The pattern is classic and symmetrical, with no decorative or ornamental elements within the grid.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, solid band of white marble that frames the playing area on all sides. It is slightly raised compared to the grid, with a smooth, polished finish and no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings.
